entityFormationAgency.description: Pennsylvania business entity registration starting point.

taxAgency.description: Pennsylvania business tax registration starting point.

licensingPortal.description: Pennsylvania local permitting and business startup starting point.

economicDevelopmentAgency.agencyName: Pennsylvania Department of Community & Economic Development
economicDevelopmentAgency.description: Pennsylvania business assistance and economic-development resources.

workforceAgency.description: Pennsylvania labor, unemployment, workers compensation, and employer resources.

VBOC.agencyName: SBA Veterans Business Outreach Center program
VBOC.description: SBA VBOC program information and locator starting point.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Register the Pennsylvania business entity when needed
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use Pennsylvania Business Filing Services to form or register the selected entity type.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before using a new legal entity for banking, contracts, or tax accounts.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Choose the intended legal structure with qualified legal and tax guidance.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record entity choice, filing date, confirmation, and professional review.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Search Pennsylvania business-name records
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Search Pennsylvania business records before relying on a proposed entity name.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before formation filings or heavy branding spend.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record searched names and results. Entity-name availability is not trademark clearance.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Confirm Pennsylvania registered-office requirements
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Confirm the registered-office or commercial-registered-office-provider requirements for the planned entity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: When forming and maintaining an entity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the registered-office arrangement and supporting records.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Register Pennsylvania business-tax accounts through myPATH
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use Pennsylvania Online Business Tax Registration through myPATH to identify and register required state tax accounts.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before conducting taxable activity or hiring employees.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Clarify entity, activity, EIN, and staffing plan.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record registered accounts and filing cadence.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Determine Pennsylvania sales-tax license requirements
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Confirm whether the business must register for Sales, Use, and Hotel Occupancy Tax or another applicable account through myPATH.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before selling taxable goods or services.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Document products, services, and selling locations.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the Department of Revenue determination and license details.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Verify Pennsylvania municipal licenses and permits
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use Pennsylvania local-permitting guidance and confirm municipal licenses, permits, and taxes with the applicable locality.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify operating address and service area.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record each municipality contacted and written guidance received.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Verify local Pennsylvania zoning and occupancy rules
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Confirm zoning, occupancy, signage, and site-specific rules with the municipality.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before signing a lease, purchasing a site, or build-out.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record municipality, address reviewed, contact, and response.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review Pennsylvania economic-development resources
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Pennsylvania Department of Community & Economic Development
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Research current Pennsylvania business-assistance and economic-development resources.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before location or expansion commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Prepare business concept and location summary.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record relevant programs and direct eligibility confirmations.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research Pennsylvania targeted-business support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Research current small diverse business and other veteran, woman, minority, and targeted-business resources.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before targeted-program applications.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Use founder-selected attributes and verify current criteria.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record programs researched and official eligibility confirmations.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Contact Pennsylvania SBDC
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use Pennsylvania SBDC advising to review the concept, assumptions, and checklist.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major spending.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record office, counselor, meeting date, and actions.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Apply for an Employer Identification Number directly from the IRS
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use the IRS tool to determine whether the business needs an EIN and apply directly when appropriate. Form a planned legal entity with the state before requesting its EIN.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: After forming a planned legal entity and before banking, payroll, or tax registrations that require an EIN.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Apply directly through IRS.gov. Record the EIN confirmation and do not pay a third-party website for an EIN.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research SCORE mentoring support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use SCORE's mentoring directory to find business-planning support and review the launch checklist with a mentor.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major spending commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the mentor contact and the assumptions reviewed.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research Veterans Business Outreach Center support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Review SBA Veterans Business Outreach Center resources when veteran or military-community business assistance may be useful.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning, especially when the founder wants veteran or military-community support.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record whether VBOC support is relevant and any counselor contact.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Confirm Pennsylvania city/county requirements directly
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Applicable Pennsylvania city or county agency
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Some cities, counties, zoning offices, health authorities, and professional boards have requirements that cannot be confirmed from a statewide placeholder. Identify the operating address and contact the local agency directly.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before operating locally, signing a lease, or relying on a local compliance assumption.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify city, county, operating address, and business activity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the local agency contacted, date, person or office, and written guidance. This item intentionally has no single statewide URL.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Food, beverage, or health-department review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when the business may prepare, serve, sell, or handle food or beverages.

tasks.title: Verify Pennsylvania retail-food-facility requirements
tasks.agency: Pennsylvania Department of Agriculture and applicable local health authority
tasks.description: Confirm retail-food-facility licensing, plan-review, inspection, and local health requirements.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before preparing food for sale or buying specialized equipment.
tasks.dependency: Document menu, preparation model, and locations.
tasks.founderNotes: Record licensing authority, inspections, and written guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Alcohol or liquor licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when alcohol sales, service, or distribution may apply.

tasks.title: Verify Pennsylvania liquor-license requirements
tasks.description: Confirm licensing requirements before selling, serving, or distributing alcohol.
tasks.founderNotes: Record license type, timeline, local review, and agency guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Construction or contractor licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when construction, home improvement, installation, repair, or contractor work may apply.

tasks.title: Verify Pennsylvania contractor-registration requirements
tasks.description: Confirm whether the planned contractor activity triggers Pennsylvania registration or other state and local requirements.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before advertising, bidding, or performing contractor work.
tasks.dependency: Define the scope of work and locations.
tasks.founderNotes: Record applicable registrations and local requirements.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Professional licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when regulated professional services may apply.

tasks.title: Verify Pennsylvania professional licensing
tasks.description: Confirm whether the planned professional service requires a current individual or business credential.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before offering a regulated professional service.
tasks.dependency: Identify service and responsible license holder.
tasks.founderNotes: Record board, credential, renewal date, and responsible professional.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Employer, payroll, and workforce review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when the business plans to hire employees or run payroll.

tasks.title: Register Pennsylvania employer accounts
tasks.agency: Pennsylvania Department of Revenue and Department of Labor & Industry
tasks.description: Use myPATH to register applicable employer-withholding and unemployment-compensation accounts and supply workers-compensation information.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before or when hiring employees, based on agency requirements.
tasks.dependency: Obtain EIN and document staffing plan.
tasks.founderNotes: Record accounts, payroll provider, and filing cadence.

tasks.title: Obtain Pennsylvania workers-compensation coverage
tasks.description: Confirm mandatory workers-compensation coverage requirements and obtain coverage for employees.
tasks.dependency: Document employee roles and request insurance guidance.
tasks.founderNotes: Record carrier, policy number, effective date, and required postings.

tasks.title: Review Pennsylvania unemployment-compensation employer requirements
tasks.description: Review unemployment-compensation account, quarterly wage-reporting, and tax responsibilities.
tasks.whenNeeded: When hiring employees or otherwise meeting UC registration rules.
tasks.dependency: Obtain EIN and establish employer accounts.
tasks.founderNotes: Record UC account and reporting cadence.

verifyWarning: Verify with the official Pennsylvania state, local, and activity-specific agency before filing, spending money, signing a lease, hiring, or relying on this checklist.
